seoTitle: Rungoo vs Runnymede — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Rungoo and Runnymede. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rungoo and Runnymede.
heading: Rungoo vs Runnymede — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rungoo, Queensland and Runnymede, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Runnymede has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Rungoo (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rungoo or Runnymede safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rungoo has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Runnymede scores 30/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rungoo scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Runnymede scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rungoo or Runnymede?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Runnymede has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
